summary: Iteration 190: Verified two P0 bug fixes - (1) PDF Print footer overlap fix and (2) PipelineProgress empty white boxes fix. Both bugs are confirmed FIXED.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix #1 (PDF footer overlap) VERIFIED: exportHtml.js line 30 has @page margin 45mm (increased from 30mm), line 67 has footer bottom:6mm (moved from 10mm), line 68 has font-size:9pt and white-space:nowrap
Bug Fix #2 (PipelineProgress empty boxes) VERIFIED: PipelineProgress.jsx line 91 defines hasAnyPipelineData conditional, line 128 wraps stat grid in {hasAnyPipelineData && (...)}
Tested case_eab7fe09d4e3 (DPP v Kola) with NO pipeline data - stat cards correctly hidden
Tested case_f65b65848793 (R v Folbigg) with pipeline data - stat cards correctly visible with values
Document preview page loads correctly with Print All button, iframe renders with correct CSS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Two P0 bug fixes verified: (1) PDF Print footer no longer overlaps body content - @page bottom margin increased to 45mm, footer positioned at bottom:6mm with 9pt font and nowrap. (2) PipelineProgress stat cards (Extracted Docs, Classified Issues, Verified Issues, Synced Grounds) only render when hasAnyPipelineData is true (at least one value > 0). Test case_eab7fe09d4e3 for no-data scenario, case_f65b65848793 for with-data scenario.

details.case_with_no_data: PASS - stat cards hidden for case_eab7fe09d4e3
details.case_with_data: PASS - stat cards visible for case_f65b65848793

features_tested.document_preview_page: PASS - loads correctly with Print All HTML payload
features_tested.case_detail_page: PASS - loads and renders PipelineProgress widget correctly
